sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5710" key="a)mfi/as" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφίας</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, a bad Sicilian wine, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0484.tlg001:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nicostr.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">18</biblScope></bibl>, Sosicr.Com.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0484.tlg001:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄμφης.</foreign> </entryFree>
